modal.title: Sankhani Chilankhulo
modal.description: Sankhani chilankhulo chimene mukufuna kugwiritsa ntchito pa SmartLink.

hero.subtitle: SmartLink imapereka kuoneka kwa ma station pa nthawi yeniyeni, kuwona mizere, kusungitsa, ndi kuyendetsa bwino ntchito zonse za pa station mu pulatifomu imodzi.
hero.metric1Label: Kupezeka kwa mafuta kumaoneka musanasankhe station
hero.metric2Label: Kuchuluka kwa mzere kumaoneka pa nthawi yeniyeni
hero.metric3Label: Malipiro ndi kusungitsa zonse mu pulatifomu imodzi
hero.panelTitle: Yapangidwa kuti igwirizane ndi ntchito zenizeni za ma station.
hero.panelSub: Ulendo wa mafuta wosalala kwa oyendetsa ndi kuwongolera kolimba kwa oyang’anira.
hero.summary1Body: Deta ya stock pa nthawi yeniyeni kuchokera ku ma station
hero.summary3Body: Prepay, wallet, ndi loyalty zonse zilipo
hero.tileOpsBody: Ma dashboard, telemetry, ndi kuwongolera ntchito zonse.

mapPreview.title: Sankhani station yabwino pogwiritsa ntchito deta yeniyeni, osati mphekesera.
mapPreview.subtitle: Fananitsani ma station apafupi, onani kuchuluka kwa mzere, tsimikizani mtundu wa mafuta, ndi kusankha mwanzeru musanayende.
mapPreview.bullet1: Onani ma station ndi momwe mzere ulili
mapPreview.bullet3: Landirani ma alert pa kusintha kwa service

how.title: Kuyambira pa kusaka mpaka pa kulandira service mu masitepe atatu osavuta.
how.subtitle: Njira yomweyi imapatsa oyendetsa chidziwitso pomwe ma station amalandira deta yolondola.
how.step1Body: Onani kupezeka kwa mafuta, mzere, ndi mtunda.
how.step2Title: Lowani mu mzere kapena sungitsani nthawi
how.step2Body: Sankhani station yoyenera ndi kuchepetsa kusatsimikiza.
how.step3Body: Fikani ndi chidziwitso chokwanira cha nthawi ndi service.

features.title: Mphamvu zazikulu za SmartLink
features.subtitle: SmartLink imayang’ana pa kupeza mafuta, kuwongolera ma station, ndi malipiro a digito.
features.availabilityTitle: Kupezeka kwa mafuta pa nthawi yeniyeni
features.availabilityBody: Ma station amapereka deta ya stock kuti oyendetsa asankhe mwanzeru.
features.verifiedBody: Oyang’anira amatha kuwongolera mapampu ndi service mosavuta.
features.alertsBody: Deta imathandiza kuyang’anira ndi kupanga malipoti.
features.transparencyBody: Malipiro ndi loyalty zimachitika mosavuta mu pulatifomu imodzi.

stations.title: Pulatifomu imodzi ya oyendetsa, ma station, ma fleet, ndi anzawo.
stations.subtitle: SmartLink imawoneka yosavuta kwa ogwiritsa ntchito koma ili ndi mphamvu yayikulu kumbuyo kwake.
stations.description: Gwiritsani ntchito SmartLink kuchepetsa kudzaza pa station, kukulitsa chidaliro cha makasitomala, kuthandiza malipiro a digito, ndi kupanga deta yolondola.
stations.driversBody: Pezani mafuta mwachangu, fananitsani mizere, sungitsani nthawi, ndi kulipira mosavuta.
stations.stationsBody: Yendetsani demand ndi kusunga station ikuyenda bwino.
stations.enterpriseBody: Yendetsani ma fleet ndi ma station ambiri mu pulatifomu imodzi.
stations.devTitle: Integrations zogwirizana ndi ma station enieni.
stations.devBody: Lumikizani queue events, malipiro, telemetry, ndi malipoti mu ma system anu.

trust.title: Yapangidwa kuti ichepetse mizere ndi kukonza service.
trust.item1Label: Availability ndi mzere zimawoneka nthawi yomweyo
trust.item2Label: Kusungitsa ndi malipiro ali ndi mbiri
trust.item4Label: Ma system a fleet ndi regulators

finalCta.title: Pezani mafuta mosavuta nthawi zonse.
finalCta.subtitle: Lowani pa SmartLink kuti muwone ma station, kuyendetsa queue, ndi kugwiritsa ntchito malipiro a digito.
finalCta.note: Yapangidwa kwa ogwiritsa ntchito ku Malawi, ma station, ndi anzawo.

footer.tagline: Kupeza mafuta, kuwongolera mzere, kusungitsa, ndi ntchito za ma station mu pulatifomu imodzi.
